channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Long area of potholes, 17th April
item.description:
Section 56 of the 1980 Highways Act , this area in Church Road Longlevens has been damaged and let’s. be honest dangerous for more than the six months allocated time stated in the Highways Act I think you have a duty of care to fix this ASAP, is this not the case ???
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Church Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long strip of tarmac missing when going round the roundabout traveling from the southeast, 17th April
item.description:
Please see image

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): C&G Roundabout, Hucclecote, Gloucester

item.title: 35-59 Hucclecote Road, GL3 3TL, 17th April
item.description:
Overflowing dumped wheelie bin with no wheels, with more and more being dumped on and around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: 10inch potholes by Greyhound pub, 17th April
item.description:
There are multiple potholes by the greyhound pub in a cluster. They were all previously marked however they have grown larger and the marking is no longer there. When driving I turned in the road and there was a car going around the potholes, almost had a head on collision. When is this going to be fixed? Been going on for months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in the road, 17th April
item.description:
Pothole in the road, previously repaired but still acts like a pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Coberley, Cotswold

item.title: Pothole in the road, 17th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Coberley, Cotswold
